titleStmt.title: SII 26.373: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 373. (A.R. No. 352 of 1909.) OLAKKŪR, TINDIVANAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Kaḍal śūḻnda pār mādarum, etc. Mentions his queen Ulaguḍai Mukkōkkiḻānaḍigaḷ.

It states that a certain Appaṉ Śāttaṉ of Kuḍippaḷḷi, the hamlet of Neḍiyam in Eyilṇeḍuṅgala-nāḍu in Vijaiya Rājēndra-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam and another man named Oraḷi Udaiyaṉ-perumāḷ of Uratti in Uratti-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam went for hunting. There the arrow aimed by the latter at a pulvāy (bird) accidentally hit the former who died due to this. Then the various groups of important people of the maṇḍalam, like the paṭṭapperumakkaḷ, periyanāṭṭār and paṉṉāṭṭār assembled and ordered that Oraḷi Udaiyaṉ Perumāḷ, to atone for the killing, should gift a nandā lamp to the god Vātāpiviṭaṅkar in the temple of the god Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēvar of Ulakkaiūr alias Rājēndranallūr in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam. Accordingly the man gave the lamp and 32 cows and a bull to provide for this. The sabhai of the central shrine of the temple accepted the animals and agreed to burn the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kaṭalcūḻnta pārmātaruṅ kalaimātaruñ cimātarum pormātarum vantu vāḻa nāṟkaṭalcūḻ puvi Eḻum pāṟkaṭal cūḻ pukaḻ parappac cotimaṇi maṇimuṭi puṉaintaruḷiyaṟu camaiyamu maiypūtamu neṟiyil vantu pārippat teṉṉavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷaru mutalāya
maṉṉavar vantiṟai kuṇantu cevippa vāḻi Ūḻi varu ceṅkoleḻupārumiṉi kaḷippac cempoṉ virasiṁhāsaṉattu Ulakuṭaimukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecaripanmarāṉa tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājātirājatevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu jayaṅkoṇ
ṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Oymānāṭāṉa vicaiyarājentravaḷanāṭṭu Eyilneṭuṅkalanāṭṭu neṭiyattuk kuṭippaḷḷi Appaṉ cāttanum veṇkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu Urattināṭṭu Uratti Oraḷi Utaiyaṉ perumāḷum pariveṭṭai poṉa Iṭattil Oraḷi Utaiyaṉ perumāḷ pulvāyai Eyta Ampu piḻaittu Iv
vappaṉ cāttaṉai Ampupaṭṭu paṭṭamaiyil Itukkup paṭṭapperumakkaḷum periyanāṭṭārum paṉṉāṭṭārum kūṭi Iruntu pirāyacittam vitittapaṭi Immaṇṭalattu Ulakkai Ūrāna rājendranallūrt tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiya mahātevar koyilil vātāpiviṭaṅkarkku Ivvappaṉ cāt
taṉukkākap pakainiṅka Ivvoraḷi Utaiyaṉ perumāṉeṉ vaitta tirununtā viḷakku Oṉṟukkum Ikkoyil tiruvuṇṇāḻikai (ca)sabhaiyom Ubhaiyamākak kaikkoṇṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭum Iṣapam Oṉṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittirununtā viḷakku Oṉṟuñ cantirātittavarai Erikkakkaṭavom Ākac camma
tittom tiruvuḷṇāḻikai (ca)sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 26.373 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
